mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_items(order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, price, quantity, total_amount, product_image, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.productImage}, NOW(), NOW())
